error_signature: No output data from SQL query
title: No output from SQL query due to strict date condition
symptom: When executing the SQL node, n8n returns no output data despite existing records in the database. The issue arises from a strict date condition in the query.
not_this_if: Query does not include date conditions
Data exists outside the specified date range
root_cause: The original SQL query used a strict condition that only matches records from the current date. This prevents any records from being returned if they do not match that exact date, even if they exist in the database.
fix_steps: Modify the SQL query to use `date(u.premium_start_at) = DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, INTERVAL 1 DAY)`
agent_instruction: Change the SQL query to fetch records from yesterday by adjusting the date condition.
